2025/26 Season

Fixtures

GW34 — Upcoming matchups

Matches of the Week · GW34
Featured Match

#1 vs #2 — The Title Showdown

Home
erozier
21–12 · 3166 pts
vs
Away
Noahvillasana17
20–13 · 2797 pts

The two teams that have led the DPL all year, finally face to face. One game separates them: erozier at 21–12 after a stunning upset loss to bjennings28, Noahvillasana17 at 20–13 after dropping a week himself. A win here and erozier walks into the final stretch with a two-game cushion in the standings — basically uncatchable. A loss and the race is tied with three weeks left, with Noahvillasana17 holding the head-to-head. Expect both sides to go for their ceiling; no one's sitting on leads this week.

Featured Match

Identical Records, One Has to Blink

Home
skoeiboy
14–19 · 2577 pts
vs
Away
Flabiano9
14–19 · 2643 pts

skoeiboy and Flabiano9 both sit at 14–19 — tied in wins, tied in losses, separated by only 66 points for on the season. Whoever loses here slips into clear possession of 11th, a full three games behind the bottom of the mid-pack. Whoever wins keeps the fight alive to finish 9th or even 8th with a late run. Neither team has been consistent — skoeiboy ambushed rmeernst last week, Flabiano9 got rolled by willmoran. One of them is getting a confidence boost and the other is getting a rough Tuesday morning email.
